title: Astra Logistics
description: End-to-end AI-powered automation of Astra's global logistics chain — from demand forecasting to last-mile routing. Reduced manual dispatch overhead by 74% and cut average delivery estimation error to under 3%.

title: Nebula FinTech
description: Real-time fraud detection pipeline processing 2.7M transactions per second. Built a graph-ML model that flags anomalous behaviour 340ms before settlement, integrated directly into Nebula's core banking infrastructure.

title: Quantum Healthcare
description: AI triage agent that triages and prioritises ER patients based on vitals, history, and symptom NLP. Deployed across 12 hospital sites, reducing critical wait times by 41% while maintaining strict HIPAA compliance.

title: Nova Retail
description: ML-driven pricing engine that reacts to competitor prices, inventory levels, and demand signals in real time across Nova's 80,000+ SKU catalogue. Delivered a 19% gross margin uplift in the first quarter post-launch.
